title: Aspen Grove
body:
**Adds a biome that is forever watching for you.** Like other types of wood, it adds base planks, trapdoors, doors, etc.
The biome spawns in the same conditions as birch, oak, and spruce forests. Adds a Honeyflower that gives a useful effect in suspicious item.
Adds a Orange Mushroom, that can be grown into a huge mushroom (a huge mushroom can only be grown, it does not spawn anywhere in the world). Aspen is as _sacred_ as it is _cursed_, The biome won't spawn **undead**, but that's why bees and foxes really like it. [![](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Ffabric_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/aspengrove/versions?l=fabric)[![](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Fneoforge_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/aspengrove/versions?l=neoforge)
FAQ ### • Will there be any backports? Versions below 1.21.1 are not planned. ### • What versions are supported? 1.21.1, the last Game Drop of this year (for example, now it is 26.1, in the summer it will be 26.2 instead) and the last Game Drop of last year (for example, now it is 1.21.11, in the future it will be 26.4). ### • Can i use this mod in my modpacks or other content? Yes, just don't forget credit us - Dungeonerr and StarmanMine142 properly.
